1<?php
2
3namespace Github\Api;
4
5use Github\Api\Organization\Actions\Secrets;
6use Github\Api\Organization\Actions\SelfHostedRunners;
7use Github\Api\Organization\Actions\Variables;
8use Github\Api\Organization\Hooks;
9use Github\Api\Organization\Members;
10use Github\Api\Organization\OrganizationRoles;
11use Github\Api\Organization\OutsideCollaborators;
12use Github\Api\Organization\SecretScanning;
13use Github\Api\Organization\Teams;
14
15/**
16 * Getting organization information and managing authenticated organization account information.
17 *
18 * @link   http://developer.github.com/v3/orgs/
19 *
20 * @author Antoine Berranger <antoine at ihqs dot net>
21 * @author Joseph Bielawski <stloyd@gmail.com>
22 */
23class Organization extends AbstractApi
24{
25    /**
26     * @link https://developer.github.com/v3/orgs/#list-all-organizations
27     *
28     * @return array the organizations
29     */
30    public function all($since = '')
31    {
32        return $this->get('/organizations?since='.rawurlencode($since));
33    }
34
35    /**
36     * Get extended information about an organization by its name.
37     *
38     * @link http://developer.github.com/v3/orgs/#get
39     *
40     * @param string $organization the organization to show
41     *
42     * @return array information about the organization
43     */
44    public function show($organization)
45    {
46        return $this->get('/orgs/'.rawurlencode($organization));
47    }
48
49    public function update($organization, array $params)
50    {
51        return $this->patch('/orgs/'.rawurlencode($organization), $params);
52    }
53
54    /**
55     * List all repositories across all the organizations that you can access.
56     *
57     * @link http://developer.github.com/v3/repos/#list-organization-repositories
58     *
59     * @param string $organization the user name
60     * @param string $type         the type of repositories
61     * @param int    $page         the page
62     * @param string $sort         sort by
63     * @param string $direction    direction of sort, asc or desc
64     *
65     * @return array the repositories
66     */
67    public function repositories($organization, $type = 'all', $page = 1, $sort = null, $direction = null)
68    {
69        $parameters = [
70            'type' => $type,
71            'page' => $page,
72        ];
73
74        if ($sort !== null) {
75            $parameters['sort'] = $sort;
76        }
77
78        if ($direction !== null) {
79            $parameters['direction'] = $direction;
80        }
81
82        return $this->get('/orgs/'.rawurlencode($organization).'/repos', $parameters);
83    }
84
85    /**
86     * @return Members
87     */
88    public function members()
89    {
90        return new Members($this->getClient());
91    }
92
93    /**
94     * @return Hooks
95     */
96    public function hooks()
97    {
98        return new Hooks($this->getClient());
99    }
100
101    /**
102     * @return Teams
103     */
104    public function teams()
105    {
106        return new Teams($this->getClient());
107    }
108
109    /**
110     * @return Secrets
111     */
112    public function secrets(): Secrets
113    {
114        return new Secrets($this->getClient());
115    }
116
117    /**
118     * @return Variables
119     */
120    public function variables(): Variables
121    {
122        return new Variables($this->getClient());
123    }
124
125    /**
126     * @return OutsideCollaborators
127     */
128    public function outsideCollaborators()
129    {
130        return new OutsideCollaborators($this->getClient());
131    }
132
133    /**
134     * @link http://developer.github.com/v3/issues/#list-issues
135     *
136     * @param string $organization
137     * @param array  $params
138     * @param int    $page
139     *
140     * @return array
141     */
142    public function issues($organization, array $params = [], $page = 1)
143    {
144        return $this->get('/orgs/'.rawurlencode($organization).'/issues', array_merge(['page' => $page], $params));
145    }
146
147    /**
148     * @return SelfHostedRunners
149     */
150    public function runners(): SelfHostedRunners
151    {
152        return new SelfHostedRunners($this->getClient());
153    }
154
155    /**
156     * @return SecretScanning
157     */
158    public function secretScanning(): SecretScanning
159    {
160        return new SecretScanning($this->getClient());
161    }
162
163    public function organizationRoles(): OrganizationRoles
164    {
165        return new OrganizationRoles($this->getClient());
166    }
167}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable

Generated by php-code-coverage 11.0.9 using PHP 8.4.16 and PHPUnit 11.5.11 at Fri Apr 10 15:27:13 UTC 2026.
